name: Two-axis (CC bin x drawdown band) partition + dominant-strategy label
description: Two-axis emissions-based partition of the SCI ensemble, with a single dominant mitigation strategy named per pathway. Both axes are properties of the emissions trajectory only (no SCM lookup): cumulative net CO2 from 2020 to net-zero year on the primary axis, and post-NZ behaviour band on the secondary axis (pos/nz/over). Within each (CC, drawdown) cell, every pathway is given the single highest-priority strategy flag that fires (suffix_rules.mode='dominant'): CDR reliance, methane-led action, aerosol/SO2 cleanup, near-term deferral or fossil lock-in. Related flags are merged into families (deepcdr+land -> cdr; defer -> lockin) and rare archetypes (fewer than min_cluster_size pathways) fold into their cell's 'base' residual, keeping the list short and communicable. No clustering / random seed is used: the archetype count is tuned entirely from this JSON. The exploratory k-means analysis that originally chose these thresholds lives in the scenariocompass repository. CC bin edges are rounded to where MAGICC v7.5.3 medians cross GW-class PW50 boundaries in the SCI ensemble. AFOLU dependence, formerly a partition axis, was demoted to a strategy flag ('land') after diagnostic showed mean landdep/other centroid separation of 0.61 SD against a within-cell spread of 1.2 SD -- below typical noise.
min_cluster_size_comment: Occupancy floor: archetypes with fewer pathways fold into their cell's 'base' residual. Raise to shorten the list, lower (or set 0) to keep niche strategies. 35 yields ~16 archetypes on the current SCI ensemble.
